name: FEBA Gunship R
short_description: FEBA Gunship R is a helicopter combat game where you engage in intense battles using a customized attack helicopter.
detailed_description:
FEBA Gunship R is a helicopter combat game where you engage in intense battles using a customized attack helicopter.

Customize Your Attack Helicopter and Base, and Take on Deadly Missions

Weapons and other parts can occasionally be recovered by destroying enemies, or acquired through purchase and crafting.

Use these parts to build and equip your attack helicopter, as well as those of your AI-controlled wingmen. Your base can also be customized by combining different components.

Deploy on missions across various locations, sometimes fighting alongside allied forces to eliminate powerful enemy units. Upgrade your firepower, durability, mobility, and more with newly obtained parts, and prepare for even greater challenges.

Simple Controls, Intense Combat

No prior experience in piloting helicopters is required—anyone can easily take control.

However, the battles are unforgiving, and even a moment of carelessness can lead to defeat. Staying aware of the battlefield and making the right tactical decisions for both offense and defense is crucial to survival.
